title: Cosmos Domain Warp — fbm domain-warped nebula (WebGL shader)
title_vi: Cosmos Domain Warp — tinh vân fbm bẻ miền (shader WebGL)
summary: A flowing nebula generated by iterated fbm domain warping in a real WebGL GLSL fragment shader, colour-mapped through the Cosmos accents. Self-contained, zero deps, runs offline; deterministic and seamless (the noise field is offset along a looping circle so frame(0)==frame(LOOP)).
usage_notes: RUN: double-click index.html (needs WebGL). KEY TECHNIQUES: a fullscreen-triangle fragment shader warps coordinates by nested fbm (q,r,f) and ramps colour through Cosmos accents; the time uniform uT loops 0..1 and the warp offset rides cos/sin(2*pi*uT) so it is seamless. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 + window.__seek(t) sets uT and draws. TUNE: octaves, warp scale, colour ramp.
summary_vi: Tinh vân chảy tạo bởi fbm bẻ miền lồng nhau trong fragment shader WebGL thật, ánh xạ màu qua bảng accent Cosmos. Tự chứa, không lib, chạy offline; deterministic & loop liền (trường noise lệch theo vòng tròn thời gian).
notes: Shader tier #1 — Ra dựng template WebGL + domain-warp. uT loop 0..1, offset cos/sin(2pi uT) → seamless; render nhỏ 480x360 vì SwiftShader phần mềm.
